$comment: Template for connecting an MCP client (Claude Code, Cursor, …) to the n10 MCP server. Copy into your project's .mcp.json (or ~/.claude.json), then replace the API key AND the URL origin with your own n10 deployment. The key only works against the host that created it — if your links are go.example.com, use https://example.com/api/mcp, not n10.in.
